reviews.review_description: What kind of joke is this? You charged people for a beta version and then are recharging them for the ability to receive updates. This is some Netslé level tomfoolery and I hope others see this and avoid buying anything from you.

People are complaining about memorizing the recipes, run through practice mode once or twice and then just use a little trial and error and you’re good 
(Also you can buy a hint for $2 lol)

reviews.review_title: Just want a oculus free mode
reviews.review_description: I understand that steam version currently has a free mode but why not the oculus version? It cany be easy to make one but the steam free mode was released a long time ago and im sure the oculus will follow soon, right? The game itself is fun and im enjoying it but i really wish that us people without steam/a pc can still experience all the modes. Otherwise, i know there are a lot of conplains but its a pretty good game.

Please add the ice like in the psvr or steam version man I wa really wondering why you would do such a thing. There are many other things that I saw the refrigerator in the front is very very weird and you should add the free mode like in the other versions. The drinks look undrinkable and I don't get why there are so many bugs. Please change this

reviews.review_description: The game is alright but it would be five stars with freeplay

As we all got the pop up this game in still UNDERDEVELOPMENT meaning it still has a way to go. But as of right now it’s a pretty decent game. I rarely play it for a long time (although I would once I know how to make all the mixes lol) but honestly it’s pretty fun learning how to make these drinks. The changes of scenery in each level is cool as well.

reviews.review_title: Definitely has potential to be on top!
reviews.review_description:
I see new clips for the steam version all the time. The graphics are much better in terms of ice functionality. Let’s start with the pros;

-16 different recipes
-Fun to play
-Comfortable 
-easy to practice 

This is already a good game, but it needs to be fine tuned. I think this could bring in at least a few hundred thousand dollars depending on the amount of effort the devs put in. 

Here are my suggestions:

-fix the lazy ice to be like the steam version 
-have actual customers come up to order the drinks. We know you already have designs, because we see them in the background!
-Make the money have value by creating a shop for different style glasses or hands/gloves and whatnot 
-maybe even sell a “make your own bar” dlc where you sell basic drinks and slowly upgrade your bar and menu
-add more details when muddling

——————————————————

This is a fun game, so please devs, don’t give up on it! Please keep working! Even minor improvements can be drastic steps in the right direction! With what I outlined, and with proper sponsorship of some of your most famous supporters , this is going to be a TOP TIER GAME! When what I outlined is ready, I think it’s time to take it out of just app lab! Thank you! If anything changes enough I shall 5 star all the way!

I’ve been playing for two days now and I love it it can be challenging when trying to remember things, and I can’t find any other tricks to do other than juggling the bottles waiting for new content tho

I love this game I play it consistently but for some reason it doesn’t have the ice cube physics now im not gonna complain over that but most of the time getting ice is a little hard when I scoop the ice the spoon would be empty so I have to touch the spoon once on the ice but other than that great game ♥️
Amazing game. The reason I have given it 4 not 5 is because you can't hold the bottles upside down like the PC version. Thank you for reading.
The game was so fun the only thing I would like is to be able to have more drinks
